summary: Inspection Packages Feature Testing Complete. Fixed critical backend bug (TypeError in create_inspection_package). All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all CRUD operations for categories and packages work correctly.

critical.issue: TypeError: InspectionPackage() got multiple values for keyword argument 'total_check_points' - FIXED
critical.fix_applied: Modified server.py line 1342-1349 to extract package data first, then override total_check_points before creating InspectionPackage object

issues: Package shows '0+ Check Points' when no categories are selected - this is expected behavior but could show 'No categories' instead

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Backend bug in create_inspection_package - was passing total_check_points twice (once from model_dump() and once as keyword arg)
VERIFIED: GET /api/inspection-categories returns empty array when no categories exist
VERIFIED: POST /api/inspection-categories creates category with items and benefits
VERIFIED: GET /api/inspection-packages returns empty array when no packages exist
VERIFIED: POST /api/inspection-packages creates package with selected categories
VERIFIED: Packages include category_details with full category information
VERIFIED: Total check points are calculated from included categories
POSITIVE: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
POSITIVE: Country selector filters data correctly
POSITIVE: Toast notifications show success/error messages
POSITIVE: Modal forms have proper validation
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed categories and packages during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inspection Packages feature is fully functional. Backend bug was fixed (TypeError in create_inspection_package). All CRUD operations work for both categories and packages. The feature is accessible via Settings > Inspection Packages tab. Country selector filters data by country_id.

backend_apis.GET /api/inspection-categories: PASS - Returns list of categories filtered by country_id
backend_apis.POST /api/inspection-categories: PASS - Creates category with items, benefits, check_points
backend_apis.GET /api/inspection-packages: PASS - Returns packages with category_details populated
backend_apis.POST /api/inspection-packages: PASS - Creates package with categories, calculates total_check_points
backend_apis.PUT /api/inspection-packages/:id: PASS - Updates package, recalculates check_points if categories change

bug_fix_details.fixed_code: package_data = package.model_dump(); package_data['total_check_points'] = total_points; package_doc = InspectionPackage(**package_data, created_by=current_user.get('id'))
bug_fix_details.root_cause: InspectionPackageCreate inherits from InspectionPackageBase which already has total_check_points field. When model_dump() was called, it included total_check_points, and then passing it again as keyword argument caused TypeError
